input: v6.7.2 — Pipeline Consistency & Dedup. 4 work items: (1) Extract Tracker Subtask logic to new core/tracker-subtask-creator.md contract with Purpose/Input/Output/Failure, refactor fix-ticket Step 4b-tracker, fix-bugs Step 3b-tracker, implement-feature Step 5a to delegate. (2) Align webhook format across 6 call-sites (implement-feature L622/L663 differs from canonical --max-time 5 --retry 0 + JSON keys issue_id/pr_url/timestamp used in fix-bugs/publish/post-publish-hook/block-handler). Decide inline -d vs heredoc canonical form. (3) Remove inline block handler duplicate from implement-feature L642-666 (keeps only core/block-handler.md reference; inline copy drifted — missing status-verification, missing mcp-body-formatting, wrong webhook format, wrong JSON key). (4) LOW doc fixes: core/fix-verification.md mode-neutral, core/state-manager.md remove forward reference to resume-ticket, state/schema.md e2e_test fields (verdict/result_path/attempts) + inline doc for triage.*/code_analysis.* reuse semantics, core/fixer-reviewer-loop.md NEEDS_DECOMPOSITION for all 3 pipelines. Version: PATCH v6.7.1 -> v6.7.2. No Automation Config contract changes, no behavior changes visible externally. Acceptance: 6 criteria including test suite passing, CHANGELOG entry in same commit, version-bump as separate commit via /ceos-agents:version-bump skill.
